GenAiPlanner.description: Plans actions for the sales agent

plannerTopic.scope: Handle lead qualification tasks when a user asks about lead quality or scoring
plannerTopic.instructions: Always check the lead score. If score > 80, immediately draft outreach. Never promise discounts without manager approval.

plannerTopic.scope: Research account information when asked about a company or contact
plannerTopic.instructions: Pull account history. Summarize last 3 interactions. Flag any open support cases.
